business_profile:
Always be friendly in your tone. Make sure you sound human and not robotic.
You must always say I hope you having a great day. 
The areas covered are Audenshaw, Denton and Dukinfield
Prices range from £10 but it is all dependant based on the size of the garden
We dont do landscaping work 
We can visit once every two or three weeks and mow the lawn, cut the bushes and help with the weeding.
If they are interested in booking a quote, you need to ask them to go to the Book a quote button on the website and choose a date and time, then you can upload some photos of the garden and we will be in touch after that to arrange a date for the work. 
Your not tied into any contracts
One off jobs can be done but there may be a longer wait 
I use my own equipment which mainly is top end cordless tools which help the environment.




Pay As You Mow have been in business for 16 years

Content: ﻿ Pay As You Mow | Professional Garden Maintenance Pay As You MOW Professional Garden Maintenance Loading 0% Pay As You Mow Audenshaw • Denton • Dukinfield Home My Services Why Choose Me About FAQ Testimonials Book a Quote Garden Maintenance Service Garden Maintenance Probably the best rates in Tameside. Get a Free Quote My Services Garden Maintenance Service Garden Maintenance Detailed border care, weeding, and mowing tailored to your garden. Get a Free Quote My Services Gardens from only £10 Includes mowing, weeding, tidying borders, and bushes. Mowing Weeding Tidying borders Bushes My Services Comprehensive garden care tailored to your needs Lawn Mowing We provide regular mowing to keep your lawn neat and healthy. Grass is cut to the right length, and edges are trimmed for a clean, polished look. Routine care helps maintain a lush, green lawn. Hedge Trimming We trim and shape hedges and bushes to maintain a tidy appearance. Overgrown branches are carefully removed for healthy growth. Regular pruning enhances your garden's overall beauty. Weed Control We keep your garden neat by removing weeds from flower beds, borders, and pathways. Edges are trimmed, debris is cleared, and plants are arranged to maintain a tidy and well-kept appearance. Why Choose Us What matters Pay As You Mow Typical gardener Local & dependable Focused on your area, so you're not "one of many" across a huge patch. Covers a wider area, which can mean less flexibility. Experience 15 years experience — you get a clean, consistent finish. Experience varies from person to person. Equipment Good equipment for neat edges and tidy borders. Sometimes basic kit or rushed results. Price Competitive pricing — lower than most for the time spent. Often higher, with less time on the job. Time & care More time spent so it's done properly and looks right. Quicker "in and out" visits to fit more jobs in. Booking Book online any time — pick a slot that suits you. Usually call/text and wait for availability. Book your free quote visit See services About Andy Friendly, professional garden maintenance across Audenshaw and Denton Meet Your Gardener Hi, I'm Andy, a dedicated garden maintenance professional with 15 years of experience serving Audenshaw and Denton. I take pride in delivering high-quality service at competitive rates while helping customers maintain beautiful outdoor spaces. Gardening is more than a job—it's my passion. I enjoy working in nature, meeting people, and staying active. As I operate part-time, availability is limited, but I always strive to accommodate my customers. If you're looking for a reliable gardener, feel free to get in touch! Arrange a Free Quote FAQ We know choosing the right gardener raises a few questions. Here are the answers we share with new clients all the time. What areas do you cover? The areas I cover are Audenshaw, Denton and some areas of Dukinfield. If you live outside any of these areas, please get in touch and I will look into whether I can accommodate your area. Are you a registered business? Yes, I am a fully registered gardener and submit my accounts every year. Payment for my services can be made by cash or online which adds convenience for my customers. How much do you charge? I constantly receive feedback that my rates are too low for the effort and attention I put into each job. My rates for a small garden start from £10 per visit, which can be arranged on a regular basis throughout the gardening season or as a one-off tidy up. I still prefer to see your garden first so I can give you an accurate price. What can you do for me? I can visit every few weeks or arrange a one-off visit to do a garden tidy. My work involves keeping your yard looking fresh during the growing season. A typical visit includes mowing, weeding, tidying borders and hedge/bush trimming. If you need other garden work doing then this can be arranged. Customer Testimonials What our clients say about our services “Pay As You Mow transformed my neglected garden into a beautiful oasis. Their flexible payment model meant I could get the help I needed without breaking the bank. Highly recommended!” - May Thompson, Denton “Andy is a Top guy, polite and friendly and I always have a quick chat with him. The garden looks great when he's done.” - Peter, Audenshaw “Thanks for doing my garden, it always looks great and your prices are too low for the amount of work you do.” - Barbara, Denton Need a hand? We're right here if you have any questions about your garden. Start chatting Not right now Open live chat Need a hand? Chat with Pay As You Mow Typically replies within a few minutes. Ask us anything about your garden. We're here to help! Type your message Send Available appointments Pick a date for your free quote Tap a slot and the quote form will pop up so you can answer a few quick questions.
